label: Conversation Memory
description: Read / write / clear / summarize / semantic-search a tenant-scoped chat conversation history. Backs stateful agents and HITL flows that span multiple user turns.

settings.name: operation
settings.label: Operation
settings.description: read = pull last N turns; write = append a new message; clear = remove all messages for this memoryId; summarize = build/refresh a rolling LLM summary; search = semantic top-K retrieval over prior turns (V1.1 vector backend).

settings.name: memoryId
settings.label: Memory ID
settings.description: Namespaced session/conversation key. Use a per-tenant + per-session value so two users don't share history.

settings.name: role
settings.label: Role (write only)
settings.description: Sender role for write operations. Ignored on read / clear / summarize.

settings.name: content
settings.label: Content (write only)
settings.description: Message body for write operations. Templates resolve through the engine's usual scope.

settings.name: metadata
settings.label: Metadata (write only)
settings.description: Optional structured metadata stored alongside the message (e.g. tool_call_id, attachments).

settings.name: limit
settings.label: Limit (read / search)
settings.description: Max number of most-recent messages to return on read; max top-K matches on search (capped at 50).

settings.name: query
settings.label: Query (search only)
settings.description: Semantic-search query text. Embedded via the platform's UniversalEmbeddingService and matched against prior message embeddings.

settings.name: summarizerModel
settings.label: Summarizer model (summarize only)
settings.description: Smart Router default 'auto'. Hard-coded model IDs are discouraged.

settings.name: summaryPrompt
settings.label: Summary prompt (summarize only)
settings.description: Optional override for the summarization system prompt. Empty = service default.

ai.shortDescription: Stateful chat memory: read / write / clear / summarize per-session history.
ai.whenToUse: When an agent flow needs prior turns to answer the next message, or when a HITL flow wants to recap the conversation before an approver weighs in.
ai.examplePrompt: read the last 10 turns for session {{trigger.body.sessionId}}
ai.promptHints: Pair a `read` upstream of agent_single/llm_completion with a `write` downstream to persist the new turn. Output: {{steps.X.messages}} for read; {{steps.X.summary}} for summarize.

outputAssertions.name: has_operation_envelope
outputAssertions.errorMessage: conversation_memory output is missing the operation envelope.
